title: adinandra subsessilis
intro: Adinandra subsessilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the 'Sundac or Chinese Bayberry'. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Adinandra subsessilis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Adinandra subsessilis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves or roots in water, or as a powder by drying and grinding its leaves or roots.
